mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, holder, card_number, bank_name, card_type, expire_date, cvv, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM bank_card WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, holder, card_number, bank_name, card_type, expire_date, cvv, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM bank_card WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bank_card (user_id, holder, card_number, bank_name, card_type, expire_date, cvv, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{holder}, #{cardNumber}, #{bankName}, #{cardType}, #{expireDate}, #{cvv}, #{isDefault})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bank_card WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bank_card SET is_default = 0 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE bank_card SET is_default = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
